pattern: A is more X than B
example_sentence: This approach is more effective than the previous one.
She is responsible for managing the entire project.
We need to consider the environmental impact of this decision.
There are more advantages than disadvantages.
Let me take a look at the report before the meeting.
I am used to working from home now.
In addition to the main course, we offer several electives.
As a result of the policy change, sales increased.
Does this explanation make sense to you?
We need to come up with a new strategy.
It depends on the situation and the available resources.
The project is likely to be completed by next month.
We need to deal with this issue immediately.
The plan is risky. On the other hand, the potential reward is high.
You are supposed to submit the report by Friday.
We should take into account the customer feedback.
As far as I know, the meeting has been postponed.
We are running out of time to finish this task.
The reason why we failed is that we lacked preparation.

pattern: not only A but also B
example_sentence: She is not only talented but also hardworking.
I have difficulty understanding technical jargon.
This book is worth reading for anyone in management.
Keep in mind that the deadline is approaching.
Regular exercise contributes to better health.
In terms of cost, this option is the best.
Regardless of the outcome, we learned a lot.

pattern: would rather do A than B
example_sentence: I would rather work from home than commute every day.
The rain prevented us from going outside.
We need to carry out the plan as scheduled.
Poor planning can result in project delays.
You should be aware of the potential risks.
I will look into the issue and get back to you.
You can leave early, provided that you finish your work.
We should take advantage of this opportunity.
We ended up staying late to finish the project.
By the time we arrived, the meeting had already started.
The new policy will have an effect on all employees.
She pointed out several errors in the report.
I was about to call you when you walked in.
What matters is that we keep moving forward.
Instead of complaining, let us find a solution.
We need to figure out the root cause of the problem.
No matter how hard it seems, we can overcome it.
Lack of sleep can lead to poor performance.
Do not put off studying until the last minute.
Are you familiar with this software?
It is essential that everyone attend the training.
The new regulation gave rise to many questions.
When it comes to cooking, she is the best in the family.
This machine is capable of processing thousands of requests per second.
